---
title: "Welcome!"
toc: false
about:
  id: intro-heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/me.jpeg
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:poch1@stolaf.edu
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/poch1-ai
---

1.  ::: {#intro-heading}
    ## Hey! this is Sokmean

    Thank you for stopping by! I was born and raised in Cambodia. I moved to Singapore in 2019 for school. Right now, I'm a student at [St. Olaf College](https://wp.stolaf.edu/). I'm doing Quantitative Economics and Statistics doubled majors. This is my first time building a website and I will display my work in data science 2. I am proud because I'm so ready to show it off to my niece, my mama, my dogs, cats and chickens. I'm sure they are proud of me too!

    ### Fun Facts About Me

    1.  Data Science only starts to make sense to me at 2am

    2.  I shop every time I submit a data science's project because I truly deserve it ( this one too)

    3.  My lashes will be on whenever I'm stressed, the longer the lashes, the harder time I'm going through. Sometimes I'm so close to fly with them too
    
    4.  I love love, and you should too
    :::
